title: she.rs: Ffi{code:-1} used for caller-size BadArgs and block validation
description: Several sites in she.rs misuse Ffi{code:-1} for argument validation that happens entirely on the caller side before any FFI call. (1) she_secure_boot:69, she_extend_seed:192, she_generate_mac:314, she_verify_mac:348 use Ffi{code:-1} for u32::try_from overflow of caller-supplied slices; should be BadArgs. (2) validate_she_block_size (she.rs:373-381) uses Ffi for both block-size check (len==0 or len%16!=0) and u32 overflow; both are pre-FFI caller-argument errors that should be BadArgs. Suggested fix: change all Ffi{code:-1} at these sites to BadArgs{msg:...} with appropriate static messages.
